title: Automation on new board
excerpt: I have built an automation that is working great on one board. Then I created a new board using that one as a template and the automation does not work on the new board. It seems to be the exact same set up. Any suggesti…

posts.author: justinbhargrove (Justin Hargrove)
posts.cookedHtml: I have built an automation that is working great on one board. Then I created a new board using that one as a template and the automation does not work on the new board. It seems to be the exact same set up. Any suggestions?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Justin,

This sounds a little strange! Can you send over a screenshot of the recipe so I understand why this might be the case? Thanks!

posts.author: justinbhargrove (Justin Hargrove)
posts.cookedHtml:
Screenshot (85)1261×717 10.1 KB

Thank you for the help. Attached is the screenshot. It is working fine on the other board that it is one.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you for sharing justin!

Can I ask that your relevant email is connected in the board? Additionally, are you sending the email to the email address from within the E+A app?
